description: Body is ~1024 lines — well over the 500-line R05 ceiling. Release-process deep-dive and installer detail could move to a reference/ subdirectory.
suggested_fix: Extract dense installer reference material into meta/skills/maintain-cross-platform/reference/ and link from the main SKILL.md.

description: Body is 555 lines — exceeds 500-line R05 ceiling. New regression since v5.8.3; likely grew with additional lifecycle-event reference material.
suggested_fix: Extract hook lifecycle reference tables into .kiro/skills/enhance-hooks/reference/ and link from the main SKILL.md.

description: Body is 517 lines — marginally exceeds 500-line R05 ceiling. Snapshot-control section could be extracted to a reference/ file.
suggested_fix: Extract snapshot-control reference into .kiro/skills/web-browse/reference/ and link from the main SKILL.md.

description: 'Create PRs for non-trivial changes' — 'non-trivial' is a vague quantifier without measurable criteria.
suggested_fix: Replace with 'Create PRs for changes that touch >1 file or modify public API'.

description: No prerequisites section — the rubric expects a section covering required tools, versions, or setup steps. Project requires Node.js and npm; neither is documented.
suggested_fix: Add a Prerequisites section listing Node.js version and npm requirement.

description: '20+ files typically indicates cross-module changes' — 'typically' is a vague quantifier without deterministic criteria.
suggested_fix: Replace 'typically indicates' with a deterministic threshold comment or remove the qualifier entirely.

description: 'For better analysis, run: /repo-intel init' — 'better' is a vague quantifier.
suggested_fix: Replace 'better' with 'for accurate symbol-level analysis' or similar concrete benefit.

description: 'Include imports/exports or call chains when relevant' — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier without criteria.
suggested_fix: Replace 'when relevant' with 'when the scenario crosses module boundaries'.

description: Phase 1.5 AskUserQuestion: 'Install for better doc sync accuracy?' — 'better' is a vague quantifier.
suggested_fix: Replace 'better doc sync accuracy' with 'for AST-level export detection instead of regex fallback'.

description: 'Each item should be completable in reasonable time' — 'reasonable' is a vague quantifier without measurable criteria.
suggested_fix: Replace 'reasonable time' with a concrete time bound such as 'within one sprint' or '<4 hours'.

description: References agent names (plugin-enhancer, agent-enhancer, claudemd-enhancer, docs-enhancer, prompt-enhancer, hooks-enhancer, skills-enhancer, cross-file-enhancer) not declared in the audited NL artifact set. If those agents are renamed, the orchestrator will break silently.
suggested_fix: Declare the referenced agent names in plugin.json or add a comment noting they are external dependencies.
